name: Toranosuke Miyamura
description: **Affiliation:** Student Council and Supernatural Studies Council vice president and supernatural club vice president. Knows of Yamada and Shiraishi switching secret.

name: Akemi Souryuuin
description: __Height:__ 168 cm Like all women in her family, Akemi has a muscle fetish, and she is way more blunt about it than her sister, Shion. She tells Hibiki that she chose to join the Silverman Gym in order to live a healthy life. By her own account, she was never really interested in anything before she discovered her love of muscles. She is unaware of how impressive her life is compared to the average person, as it is completely normal to her.

name: Dianna Soreil
description: The Queen of the Moon, Dianna Soreil is the hereditary ruler of the Moonrace. Now that the Earth has regenerated from the destruction wrought by the Dark History, she believes that it is time for her subjects to return to Earth. Dianna lands a colonial force on the Earth in the hopes that they will be allowed to live in America's sparsely-populated sunbelt area. name: Lloyd de Saloum
description: The seventh prince of the royal family that rules the Kingdom of Saloum. He was reincarnated and grows up with the memories of his previous life as a sorcerer. Although he's only ten years old, he has an enormous amount of sorcery knowledge and possesses mana that even terrifies demons. He's not interested in things such as succession to the throne, girls, or romance. Instead, his activities and desires are all focused on the research of his beloved sorcery and its practice. At some point, the D.E.M. captured her by unknown means and she fell into a comatose state.!~

name: Tokio Kurohara
description: __Height:__ 175 cm The protagonist of Choujin X. Tokio is a second-year student at Tsuru High, and is a good friend of [Azuma Higashi](https://anilist.co/character/224490/Azuma-Higashi)'s. Following the events of the first chapter, Tokio became a Bestial Choujin. As a small child, he and his classmates went on a field trip to a zoo, where they had to draw an animal that represented them. name: Gauche Adlai
description: __Height:__ 181 cm He is a nobleman of House Adlai and a member of Clover Kingdom's Black Bull squad. He is also the smartest and most clever member of the Black Bulls. Obsessed with his sister Marie.

name: Kaede Manyuda
description: A second-year student and student council treasurer. He has a strong desire for power and is very ambitious, to the point where he is plotting to overthrow his seniors, even in the student council, as soon as he has a chance. He is the manipulative Treasurer of the Student Council, having his own goal to take down Kirari Momobami. ~!Became a Housepet with 10 billion Yen debt after losing to Jabami. name: Michiru Kinushima
description: Michiru Kinushima is a Spotter at Terminal Service #1, and is partnered with Zack. She is Tsukasa Mizugaki's senior and mentor at Terminal Service. (Source: Plastic Memories Wiki)

name: Ryuu
description: Shirayuki's mentor pharmacist and a genius with medicine. He works very diligently but when his concentration is broken he goes to sleep (usually under his desk although he can sleep almost anywhere)

name: Teoritta
description: The Sword Goddess who made a contract with [Xylo](https://anilist.co/character/355722/Xylo-Forbartz). She summons numerous swords, including holy swords and demon swords. While possessing a high sense of self-worth and a fondness for being praised, she also exhibits a characteristic goddess-like trait of engaging in self-sacrificing actions.

name: Kaede Otori
description: An airhead who likes to take things slow, to the point where she kept on watching a fireplace recording from Christmas to New Year's Day.

name: Kamisama
description: Appears after Punpun says a special chant his uncle taught him. He helps Punpun with his problems. ~!His "help" is frequently an incitement to violence.!~ ~!As the manga keeps going, it's revealed that "God" is really the manifestation of Punpun's darker thoughts.!~

name: Yuiko Kurugaya
description: __Height:__ 170 cm Yuiko is Riki's classmate who has a self-sufficient personality. She is sometimes seen carrying a replica of a katana. She is seen as an older sister to everyone despite being the same age of almost the entire cast, and is referred to as Anego (姉御, "elder sister") by Haruka. She is fond of things or people she considers to be cute, such as several of the female cast of characters. She gets high grades in school and is especially gifted in mathematics. She was born outside of J

name: Arc
description: A Japanese gamer who, after falling asleep playing an online game, finds himself trapped in his game avatar, seemingly transported to a different world. In the game, the only paid avatar was a full-body skeleton, which he chose despite wearing full-body armor. When arriving in this world he still is in the body of a skeleton, which he figures out to be a curse. So he thinks up his own background story to be "a knight that is trying to find a cure for his curse".

name: Ashaf
description: A soft-spoken man with delicate features, a coffin strapped to his back, and an entourage of crows. Ashaf currently works for the Order of Magical Resonance, a group that works by magic, for magic and of magic. His partner is Guideau. ~!They are currently both looking for the traces of a specific witch in order to remove the curse on Guideau.!~

name: Ponzu
description: Examinee #246 during the Hunter Exam. Ponzu is the only prominent female who managed to enter the last few stages of the Hunter exam. Her secret weapon lies in the big round hat she wears, which carries powerful bees under the surface that emerge and attack people that threaten her. Although Ponzu is a relatively minor character in the series, her cute and girlish charm has won her some fans who voted for her in an early Hunter popularity poll. ~!During the fourth stage of the Hunter exam her be

name: Ruri
description: Ruri is [Kohaku](https://anilist.co/character/124143/Kohaku)'s elder sister and the daughter of [Kokuyo](https://anilist.co/character/150509/Kokuyo), and serves as the priestess of Ishigami Village. She is similar to Kohaku in appearance but has longer hair and a more hourglass-shaped body. She wears a black sundress and a piece of rope around her neck.

name: Tsukasa Tenma
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'8") / 173 cm (5'8'') Tsukasa is a member of the musical show unit Wonderlands x Showtime. Tsukasa is a confident and charismatic person who refers to himself as a future “star.” He has a notable habit of showing off, along with a tendency to get caught up in the moment. Despite this, he is a caring and reliable older brother to his younger sister, [Saki](https://anilist.co/character/261066/Saki-Tenma), often worrying about her and taking care of her.

name: Velvet Crowe
description: Velvet is a 19-year-old woman on a quest for vengeance. Her life changed due to an incident that occurred three years prior to the events of the story, during the Scarlet Night. She fights with a blade mounted on her right-hand gauntlet, her feet, and the demonic left arm. At some point, she joins Aifread's pirate team to face a common enemy. (Source: Aselia Wiki)
